positive: A symmetrical, stylized biomechanical mandala featuring celestial elements like crescent moons, constellations, and simplified mythical creatures (e.g., hummingbirds, deer antlers). The design must be rendered as a high-contrast negative space silhouette on a clean, solid background (off-white or deep indigo). Use ornate linework, geometric abstraction, and a clean, crisp ink-and-wash style. The composition should be perfectly centered and circular, suitable for seamless repetition or large apparel prints. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Celestial Geometry. Lighting: Studio flash, emphasizing crisp edges and deep shadows. Color direction: Monochromatic teal and gold accents only, maximizing contrast.
negative: blurry, artifact, low resolution, amateur, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, grunge, messy, distorted, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, solid color background (unless specified for silhouette)
